title: Ecobag - 20 Pack Eco-Friendly Wheelie Bin Liners - 240L - Heavy Duty & Leak Resistant Recycling Bags for Garden, Kitchen, House, Office & Caterers (1194 × 1325mm) (Everyday (18μm)
features: Eco-Friendly Material – Made from a minimum of 98% recycled plastic, these industrial wheelie black bin bags are an environmentally responsible choice, supporting plastic waste reduction and recycling efforts.
Reliable for Everyday Use – Designed for light to moderate waste, these 18μm heavy duty bin bags offer dependable strength for household, garden, and office waste disposal without unnecessary bulk.

Leak-Resistant Design – Built with enhanced leak resistance, these garbage bags help contain spills, making them suitable for dry and light wet waste, refuse sacks ensuring a clean and hassle-free waste disposal experience.

"100% Recyclable – Fully recyclable after use, these wheelie bin liners promote eco-friendly disposal practices, large black bin bags help to reduce landfill waste and minimize environmental impact. "

Convenient 20-Pack – Each pack includes 20 extra-large 240L wheelie bin bags, measuring 1194 x 1325 mm. Perfect for daily household waste and lighter commercial applications, offering a practical and economical waste solution. Packaging may vary based on availability.
description: From the manufacturer 20 Heavy Duty Wheelie Bin Liners EcoBag 20 Heavy Duty Wheelie Bin Liners, 240 Litre Capacity Black Bag Eco Bag 20 Heavy Duty Wheelie Bin Liners are perfect for lining your wheelie bin to prevent them from getting dirty or smelly. Their sole purpose is this & not to hold any excessive amounts of weight. *FOR AUTHENTICITY PLEASE PURCHASE VIA 'DISPATCHED BY AMAZON'* Size 1194mm x 1325mm (240litre) Wheelie Bin Liner I Used To Be Rubbish These bags are made from a minimum of 98% recycled plastic & are 100% recyclable. Doing Our Bit To Help Because we make these bags from recycled plastics, We are doing our bit help to prevent some plastic going to landfill sites.
